home.question: What is CIVILIA Developments and what does the company do?
home.answer: CIVILIA Developments is a leading Egyptian real estate development company specializing in integrated construction and community building. We develop a diverse range of projects - from fully integrated residential compounds and commercial facilities to infrastructure and industrial projects - across Egypt's most in-demand locations.

home.question: How many years of experience does CIVILIA have?
home.answer: CIVILIA brings over 20 years of expertise in the construction and real estate sector. This deep experience spans large-scale contracting, residential developments, commercial facilities, infrastructure projects, and mixed-use communities - giving us the insight to deliver projects that genuinely meet our clients' needs at every stage.

home.question: What is CIVILIA's vision and what values drive the company?
home.answer: CIVILIA's vision is to build communities - not just buildings. We design environments where people can truly live, connect, and thrive. Our three core values guide every decision we make: Sustainability, Human-Centric Design, and Family-Focused Living.

home.question: Who are CIVILIA's consulting and design partners?
home.answer: CIVILIA collaborates with top-tier engineering and design consultancy firms to ensure the highest standards of execution on every project. For CIV West, the master plan was designed in partnership with ADC, one of Egypt's leading architecture and planning consultancies.

project.question: Where is CIV West Compound located?
project.answer: CIV West is located in Thawra El Khadra district, Sheikh Zayed City, West Cairo - minutes from Dandy Mega Mall, Hyper One, Abraj Zayed, and Al Ahly Club Sheikh Zayed branch.

project.question: Who is the developer of CIV West?
project.answer: The developer is CIVILIA Developments, a company with extensive experience in construction and contracting before entering the real estate development field.

project.question: What is the total area of CIV West?
project.answer: The total area of CIV West is approximately 38,000 square meters, the majority of which is dedicated to green spaces, artificial lakes, and recreational facilities to maximize privacy and open views for residents.

project.question: What unit types are available in CIV West?
project.answer: The project offers residential apartments in various sizes suitable for small, medium, and large families, featuring modern designs and balconies overlooking the landscaping and water features within the compound.

project.question: Is there an installment plan available?
project.answer: Yes. CIVILIA offers flexible payment plans for CIV West including a low down payment and multi-year installments. Contact the sales team for the latest available offers.

project.question: What are the key amenities in CIV West?
project.answer: CIV West is a boutique compound spanning 9 acres, with just a 23% building footprint and 77% open landscape - so space, privacy, and greenery come first. At its heart is a clubhouse featuring a gym, a business lounge, a café, and padel courts on the rooftop. An on-site commercial area covers your everyday needs, with two separate entrances - one for residents and one for guests - alongside a dedicated kids area. The entire project sits above full underground parking, keeping the surface clean, safe, and traffic-free. Built on a master plan by ADC and constructed with premium Delta Block bricks, every amenity is backed by genuine planning and build quality.

project.question: How can I book a unit in CIV West?
project.answer: Contact CIVILIA's sales team via 16727 or through the contact form on the official website. A site visit will be arranged and all available payment plans reviewed with you.

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.paragraph1: CIV West Compound is a fully integrated residential development by CIVILIA Developments, located in Thawra El Khadra, Sheikh Zayed City, spanning total area of 38,000 square meter.
ourStory.paragraph2: The project offers modern apartments with contemporary designs, expansive green spaces, artificial lakes, and a complete suite of leisure and sports facilities - all with flexible payment plans tailored for families seeking premium living in West Cairo.
ourStory.paragraph3: CIV West is designed to deliver a balanced lifestyle that harmonizes tranquility, luxury, and proximity to the essential services modern Egyptian families need - through thoughtful urban planning that dedicates the majority of the compound’s area to green spaces, water features, and open walkways.
ourStory.paragraph4: The project is a direct embodiment of CIVILIA's motto - From Land to Landmark - combining contemporary architecture, smart design details, and an integrated ecosystem of recreational, sports, and retail amenities within the compound.

residentialUnits.bottomText: Built by engineers. Delivered with precision.

projectOverview.title: About CIV WEST
projectOverview.paragraph1: At CIV WEST we didn't just build homes — we designed a way of life. Across 38,000 m² in the heart of Sheikh Zayed, we made room for greenery and calm, and cared for every detail — working with leading consultants and building to last.
projectOverview.paragraph2: Here, privacy isn't a luxury; it's the feeling that this place is truly yours, and yours alone.

primeLocation.title: Prime Location
primeLocation.description: sits at the center of Thawra El Khadra in Sheikh Zayed City—one of West Cairo's most sought-after upscale residential districts.

masterPlan.title: Master Plan
masterPlan.description: In collaboration with ADC – Architecture and Design Consultant, we have carefully considered every aspect of modern living, from the layout of streets and parks to the design of homes and amenities, creating a community where every detail enhances your lifestyle.
